reasoning: The base rating for Divya Deshmukh on Wikipedia as of Dec 21, 2025 is exactly 2497. A 1% increase requires her to reach ~2521.97 (or 2522). Wikipedia relies on official FIDE ranking updates, which are strictly published on the 1st of every month. Therefore, on Dec 28, 2025, the Wikipedia table will almost certainly still show the December 1st updates, resulting in no rating change. For the Jan 20, 2026 resolution, her Jan 1st rating would apply; however, there is no evidence she participated in any major classical events in late November or December 2025 after her FIDE World Cup exit that would yield a massive 25-point rating spike. For the March 21, 2026 resolution, she has a broader window to play in January/February events (like Tata Steel). While she is an incredibly fast improver (gaining ~34 points since July 2025 to earn her GM title), a 25-point leap at the 2500+ standard is extremely difficult to achieve in just two active rating periods, so it remains less likely than not, but the probability logically increases with the time horizon.
